bug_locations.reason: FormData values for plain Python sequence annotations (list/set/tuple) are only handled when field.shape in sequence_shapes. Untyped built-in collections likely do not get a matching shape, causing .get() to be used instead of .getlist().
The scalar-sequence detection special-cases plain sequence types via lenient_issubclass(field.type_, sequence_types), but this logic is not consistently reused in request body parsing for forms.
